C++ reference encoded .drc files

These files are generated by the C++ test tooling (speed comparison / encoder outputs) and are used as reference inputs for Rust tests that compare C++ and Rust encoder/decoder outputs. They can be regenerated by building the C++ tools and running the `speed_compare` or `speed_compare_test` example.

Files in this directory are optional: tests that depend on these files will skip when the files are not present.
